title: Fix Admin Button Footer Link to Admin Dashboard

requirements.text: Update the admin button in the ContactFooter component to navigate directly to the admin dashboard page (/admin) without requiring authentication or authorization checks

quotes: Admin Authentication: admin dashboard ko directly accessible hona chahiye
Admin Button Location: ABL Pulse ke Footer me
Sirf Link Karna hai. Koi Work Is time nahi karna hai, only link karna hai

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the admin button in the footer navigates to the admin dashboard page
No 'Access Denied' screen appears when clicking the admin button
Admin dashboard page loads directly without authentication checks

requirements.text: Remove or bypass authentication/authorization checks on the AdminDashboardPage component to allow direct access without login

quotes: admin dashboard ko directly accessible hona chahiye

acceptanceCriteria: Admin dashboard page renders without checking for authentication state
Users can view admin dashboard content immediately upon navigation
No access denied or login redirect logic blocks access to the admin dashboard

constraints: Do not modify the backend authentication logic
Only update frontend routing and navigation behavior
Keep all existing admin dashboard functionality intact
nonGoals: Adding new admin features or functionality
Modifying admin dashboard UI or data display
Adding security measures or access control
